support.headerSubtitle: Get quick answers to common questions or open a ticket with our support team.
support.chatDesc: Chat in real time with our technical team.
support.emailDesc: Send your request to our support. Average response: 2 hours.
support.hotlineDesc: Speak directly with a support agent for critical needs.
support.phSubject: e.g. The CSV export format is misaligned
support.phDescription: Describe step by step what happened, error messages, or what you were trying to do…
support.faq1q: How do I create a new milestone on my project board?
support.faq1a: Go to the projects page, select your active project, open the “Milestones” tab then click “+ Add a milestone”. Enter the name, the period and choose the tasks to group together.
support.faq2q: Where can I download project analytics reports?
support.faq2a: Go to the Reports page in the sidebar. There you can set the parameters, select your projects, choose the PDF or CSV format and export them immediately.
support.faq3q: How do I reset my account password?
support.faq3a: Click your avatar at the top right of the header, open “Edit profile” then the “Security” tab. Enter your old password and set a new, secure one.
support.faq4q: What is the task velocity score based on?
support.faq4a: The velocity trend measures how fast your team clears the backlog. It divides the total number of completed tasks by the number of days in the active sprint cycles.
